caveats: Agent Lab may use browser speech recognition when available, but typed input remains the reliable fallback.
Continuous voice remains disabled until explicit consent, interruption behavior, privacy posture, and runtime alignment are reviewed.
Voice turns must use the same governed runtime, evidence, dynamic views, memory, audit, and capability gates as typed turns.
guardrails: Do not enable always-listening behavior without user consent.
Do not bypass evidence, guardrails, or human-review gates for spoken requests.
Voice should stream the same runtime events used by Agent Lab.
